videos.title: Kayseri to host Snowboard World Cup for third straight time
videos.description:
There's a few sports you'd associate with Turkey. Football, wrestling and even basketball. But what about snowboarding? Well, for the third year in a row, the World Cup is set to take place in Kayseri and as Adefemi Akinsanya fnds out, it's a chance to boost tourism and the popularity of winter events in the country.

Beyond The Game is a five times a week show that tells you everything you need to know about your favourite sports. We’ll be at the biggest events bringing you exclusive features and the best interviews.

It is your one stop shop for sport, Monday to Friday at 1630 GMT.

Beyond The Game: http://trt.world/beyondthegame

videos.description:
SHANE MCCONKEY. "Free skier and base ski pioneer, Shane has been called the most influential skier of all time." Clip from Search For Freedom's documentary about extreme sports.

videos.title: Pelion Winter  Trails
videos.description:
Pelion is a unique mountain in the center of Greece,the mountain begins where the beach ends and it has a lot of trails for all kind of cycling and all year round.

Montis Ordo and Mtbphoto.gr created the Pelion winter Trails.Located in one of the most beautiful areas of Greece this video is presenting the amazing trails and landscape of Pelion mountain.Starting up from the village of Milies going downhill to the train station.We had a very good time by filming and editing and soon we will have a lot more to show from the unknown trails of Pelion.

Rider:Alex Petroutsos
Filming:Dimitis Papazoglou
Special thanks to Vasso Karagianni
www.mtbphoto.gr

videos.title: In Erciyes, the spouses competed on the snow with the slogan "You have become unbearable now"
videos.description:
A sledding competition between couples was held at Erciyes Winter Sports and Tourism Center with the slogan "You are now unbearable".
14 couples participated in the competition organized by Kayseri Metropolitan Municipality Erciyes AŞ at Erciyes Ski Center Tekir Kapı.
In the event, men first pulled their wives uphill with a sled to the point where the race would take place. The couples then skied down the hill and struggled to reach the finish line as quickly as possible.
In the competition, Murat and Güneş Aktuğ couple came first, Hayrettin and Sümeyye Nergiz couple came second, and Ali and Şerife Öztürk couple came third.
Various awards were given to the winners.
Erciyes AŞ Chairman of the Board of Directors, Hamdi Elcuman, said that there were fun moments in the 9th competition.
Explaining that the contestants struggled with their spouses, Elcuman said, "It was a very enjoyable race. There are no losers in this race. We came to have fun, and we all had fun." said.
Murat Aktuğ, who participated in the competition from Izmir and won the first place with his wife, said that he won the competition for his family.
Stating that they had a beautiful day and memories as a family, Aktuğ said, "We have been married for 8.5 years and we have had our son Poyraz in our lives for 5.5 years. Was it difficult to film my husband? He has been filming me for 8.5 years. Today, I filmed him. I thank him for putting up with me." "Thank you. We were together and supported each other on this beautiful day," he said.
